target.title: test(agents): use synthetic tool schema fixtures
target.body:
## Summary
- Replace private reported tool/plugin fixture names in schema-quarantine tests with synthetic `fuzzplugin` / `fuzz_move_angles` names.
- Keep the assertions and expected diagnostics equivalent so follow-up hardening PRs do not carry unrelated scrub noise.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: test fixtures no longer use the private reported plugin/tool name while preserving the same unsupported-schema scenarios.
Real environment tested: local node-wrapper Vitest after final rebase; AWS Crabbox changed gate before the final clean rebase.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run <14 changed test files> --reporter=verbose`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check <changed test files>`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; private-name/private-path branch scrub; `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: final post-rebase focused Vitest passed 6 routed shards / 308 tests at head `7657b149612b4353cd255b78e023bcefcc68c954`; oxfmt passed; diff check passed; forbidden-name and private-path scrub returned no matches; AWS Crabbox run `run_105f36331a26` on lease `cbx_105f224a59ff` passed `pnpm check:changed` before the final clean rebase.
Observed result after fix: all changed fixtures use synthetic names and the changed test/format lanes remain green.
What was not tested: no packaged or live assistant run, because this PR changes test fixture names only.

## Verification
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run <14 changed test files> --reporter=verbose` passed 6 routed shards / 308 tests after final rebase
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check <changed test files>`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- private-name/private-path branch scrub returned no matches
- AWS Crabbox `run_105f36331a26` / `cbx_105f224a59ff`: `pnpm check:changed` passed before final clean rebase
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` passed clean before final clean rebase
